academic_requirements.summary: This is a new 2026/27 single-cycle programme and, on the official pages found, it is still pending ministerial approval. No programme-specific 2026/27 admission call or full academic entry requirements were published as of 2026-06-04 [uncertain].
academic_requirements.prior_degree_or_diploma: An upper secondary school diploma or equivalent foreign qualification suitable for university access will likely be required, but the programme-specific requirement page was still under construction and did not publish full admission rules [uncertain].
academic_requirements.subject_requirements: No programme-specific subject requirements or officially confirmed entry-test rules were published on the MedTech programme pages found [uncertain].
academic_requirements.gpa_or_country_requirements: No GPA threshold or country-based admission detail was published for MedTech on the official pages found. Applicants with foreign qualifications will likely need to meet University of Padua entry-title rules, but this was not yet stated in a MedTech-specific call [uncertain].

language_requirements.required_level: No programme-specific 2026/27 English-language requirement was published on the official MedTech pages found [uncertain].
accepted_proofs: If MedTech follows the University's central rule for English-taught degree programmes, accepted proofs are the certificates listed on the University's central English-language page, but this had not yet been confirmed in a MedTech-specific call [uncertain].
exemption_rules: No MedTech-specific exemption rule was published on the official pages found [uncertain].

The University's central English-language page exempts applicants whose previous education was entirely in English and native English speakers from listed countries, but MedTech-specific adoption was not yet stated [uncertain].
language_requirements.deadline: No programme-specific certificate deadline was published for MedTech as of 2026-06-04 [uncertain].

application_deadline_eu.call_two: Spring 2026, dates TBD on the central limited-access English-programmes page; no MedTech-specific EU window was published [uncertain].
application_deadline_eu.notes: No programme-specific 2026/27 EU application window was found. The programme is still pending ministerial approval. The central page for limited-number English programmes lists an EU/non-EU-residing-in-Italy second call in Spring 2026 with dates TBD, but MedTech was not explicitly named [uncertain].

application_deadline_non_eu.call_one: 7 January 2026 - 7 March 2026 on the central limited-access English-programmes page; no MedTech-specific non-EU call was published [uncertain].
application_deadline_non_eu.notes: No programme-specific 2026/27 non-EU application window was found. The programme is still pending ministerial approval. The central page for limited-number English programmes lists a non-EU first call from 7 January to 7 March 2026, but MedTech was not explicitly named [uncertain].

required_documents.notes: Used from the central application page for English-taught degree programmes because no MedTech-specific admission call was published [uncertain].
Listed on the central bachelor's application page for English-taught programmes; no MedTech-specific call was available [uncertain].

required_documents.document_name: Certificate proving 1 or 2 years of academic studies, or a post-secondary qualification, or a foundation course qualification
required_documents.notes: Required only if the applicant does not have a minimum 12-year school record; drawn from the central bachelor's application page because no MedTech-specific call was available [uncertain].

required_documents.document_name: Certificate of entrance examination to access university
required_documents.notes: Required only if the awarding country's law requires it; drawn from the central bachelor's application page because no MedTech-specific call was available [uncertain].

required_documents.document_name: Official translation into English or Italian of academic documents
required_documents.notes: Drawn from the central bachelor's application page because no MedTech-specific call was available [uncertain].

entry_exam_or_test.test_name: Selection method not yet published; the programme page states 'Scheduled access' and the school page describes the programme as limited-access [uncertain].

source_quotes.quote: Pending approval of the italian Ministry of University and Research
still pending the necessary Ministerial approval
First call (only for non-EU citizens residing outside Italy): January 7 - March 7, 2026
Second call (only for EU citizens and non-EU citizens residing in Italy): Spring 2026, dates TBD

uncertainty_notes: As of 2026-06-04, the MedTech programme is still marked on official University of Padua pages as pending approval by the Italian Ministry of University and Research.
No programme-specific 2026/27 admission call, course factsheet on apply.unipd.it, or published entry-test rules were found on official pages.
The faculty prerequisites page for MedTech is live but says 'Site under construction', so academic, language, test, and deadline details remain provisional.
The central English-programmes admissions page provides general limited-access timelines, but it does not explicitly name MedTech; those timeline references are therefore reported as uncertain.
